nasb.text: And Jesus came up and spoke to them, saying, “All authority has been given to Me in heaven and on earth.

esv.text: And Jesus came and said to them, “All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me.

cnv.text: 耶穌上前來，對他們說：“天上地上一切權柄都賜給我了。

ccb.text: 耶稣上前对门徒说： “天上地下所有的权柄都交给我了。

csbs.text: 耶稣前来，对他们说：“天上和地上所有的权柄都赐给我了。
